scenario.name: dialpad_uac
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:13800003333@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: agent <sip:[service]@sip.merchant.yunshu.com>;tag=[call_number] To: 13800003333 <sip:13800003333@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: sip:[service]@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: yunshu-dialpad-direct-test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-16 a=sendrecv

ACK sip:13800003333@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: agent <sip:[service]@sip.merchant.yunshu.com>;tag=[call_number] To: 13800003333 <sip:13800003333@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:[service]@[local_ip]:[local_port] Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:13800003333@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: agent <sip:[service]@sip.merchant.yunshu.com>;tag=[call_number] To: 13800003333 <sip:13800003333@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 BYE Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
